_comment: Project-scoped MCP servers (committed). Selection principle: each entry closes an explicit capability gap for THIS stack, not 'nice to have'. context7 = up-to-date library docs (FastAPI/SQLAlchemy/aiogram/React) instead of stale memory. postgres = read-only introspection of the dev DB for schema/data questions without round-tripping through psql; DSN comes from ${PG_DEV_URL} so NO credentials are committed (export it; the dev db port is not published by default, so publish 5432 or point at a tunnel). playwright = drives the frontend e2e contour (native-liquid-glass + responsive specs).

postgres._comment: Read-only. Set PG_DEV_URL, e.g. postgresql://budget_app:<pw>@localhost:5432/budget_db (requires publishing the db port or a tunnel). Server is inherently read-only — safe against the dev DB.
